title: Look Back
tmdbOverview: Popular, outgoing Fujino is celebrated by her classmates for her funny comics in the class newspaper. One day, her teacher asks her to share the space with Kyomoto, a truant recluse whose beautiful artwork sparks a competitive fervor in Fujino. What starts as jealousy transforms when Fujino realizes their shared passion for drawing.
synopsis: Look Back is a 2024 animation and drama film from Japan. It holds a solid 7.8 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a PG certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
